introSection: Space Coaster (Japanese: スペースコースター) was a steel enclosed roller coaster previously located at Takarazuka Family Land in Takarazuka, Hyōgo, Japan.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The trains were designed to resemble a spaceship.

sections.title: External links

fullText:
Space Coaster (Japanese: スペースコースター) was a steel enclosed roller coaster previously located at Takarazuka Family Land in Takarazuka, Hyōgo, Japan.



The trains were designed to resemble a spaceship.


 * Official Sansei PDF featuring the coaster
